Title: "The Haters"

panel 1.
Two round characters sit in a cinema.
Yellow blob "I hate this!"
Red Blob "Me too!"

Panel 2.
They have left the cinema
Red blob "I hated every minute of that film! It was nothing like the book!"

Panel 3.
"Did you like the book?" asks Yellow.
Red replies "I hated it!" then asks "You?"

Panel 4.
Yellow blob "I've not read it. I hated the film purely on its own merits."

Panel 5.
Red blob "I'll lend you my copy."
Yello blob"That's very kind."

Panel 6.
Caption: "Later"
Yellow, reading the book "I hate this!"
Red (happily) "I knew you would!!"

images.alt:
A whimsical, surreal bird-like creature perches on a thin branch surrounded by hanging fuchsia flowers. The small creature has an unusual appearance, with a textured blue body that resembles layered scales or carved wood. Its chest is lighter in color, covered with soft cream-colored feather patterns that contrast with the blue surface of its head and back.

The creature’s most striking feature is its oversized eyes. Two enormous round eyes dominate its face, with glossy black pupils surrounded by warm reddish-orange rings. They bulge outward slightly, giving the bird an intensely curious and slightly bewildered expression. Between the eyes extends a long, narrow beak that looks almost metallic, ending in a small rounded tip.

A dramatic side-profile portrait shows a punk-styled figure standing against a gritty urban wall covered with faded posters and scattered graffiti. The vivid color is intensified by red lighting that washes across the left side of the figure.

The subject wears a heavy black leather jacket layered with metal studs and spikes across the shoulders and collar. The jacket’s worn surface reflects subtle highlights, revealing creases and textures from years of use. Underneath, thin necklaces hang loosely at the chest, adding to the layered street aesthetic.

The lighting is cinematic, with deep shadows falling along the right side of the face while red and teal tones create a moody contrast across the skin and clothing. The subject’s expression is focused and serious, lips slightly parted, their gaze angled downward as if lost in thought. A small hoop earring catches light along the ear.

images.alt:
An expressive painting shows a solitary figure standing beside a calm body of water beneath a swirling, radiant sky. The figure is rendered as a slender silhouette in deep violet and indigo tones, facing away toward the horizon. Their long, flowing dress spreads outward like a ribbon of paint caught in motion, blending into the surrounding landscape with streaks of purples, blues, and scattered dots of vibrant color.

The sky dominates the upper portion of the scene, where thick, energetic brushstrokes swirl around a blazing sun. The sun glows intensely in shades of yellow, orange, and red, surrounded by spiraling clouds of white and teal that radiate outward like a vortex of light. The dramatic sky reflects faintly on the surface of the water below, creating a subtle echo of the swirling motion above.

The shoreline and nearby meadow are alive with bursts of color. Bright circular dabs of paint—reds, oranges, yellows, and aquas—dot the ground like wildflowers scattered across the grass. The texture of the paint is thick and tactile, with visible strokes and layered pigments giving the entire composition a dynamic, impressionistic feel.

In the distance, dark hills rise along the horizon, separating the glowing sky from the reflective water. The figure’s posture appears open and contemplative, arms slightly extended as though embracing the wind or the vast landscape. The painting conveys movement, emotion, and color in bold sweeping gestures, blending nature and imagination into a dreamlike moment of quiet wonder.

Keywords
